case_title: CITY & COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO VS TOGAFAU, THERESA

docket_entries.description: SUBSTITUTED PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT TOGAFAU, THERESA

MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $5,000.00 FILED BY CITY & COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO OFFICE OF THE TREASURER & TAX COLLECTOR AS TO DEFENDANT TOGAFAU, THERESA ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUN-27-2002 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
